Tools for Sale

From time to time, Cape Cod Makers sells surplus tools and equipment to members and the public. Items are priced fairly and proceeds support our makerspace.

Current Inventory

No items are currently listed. Check back soon, or contact us to be notified when new items become available.

How It Works

  1. Browse available items listed on this page
  2. Contact us to inquire about a specific item
  3. Pick up at our Harwich location (or arrange shipping for smaller items)
Contact Us About Tools
